sql_array: CREATE TABLE configuration (id INT PRIMARY KEY, section VARCHAR(50), item_name VARCHAR(50), value VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO configuration (id, section, item_name, value) VALUES (1, 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '1112');
INSERT INTO configuration (id, section, item_name, value) VALUES (2, 'Parameters', 'MaxConnections', '100');
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM configuration WHERE value = cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort')) AS port_exists;
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM configuration WHERE item_name IN (SELECT value FROM configuration WHERE section = 'Parameters')) AS items_exist;
SELECT section, COUNT(*) FROM configuration GROUP BY section HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'MaxConnections') AS max_connections WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM configuration WHERE id = 2);
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM configuration WHERE item_name = 'MaxConnections') AND (cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort')::INT > 0);
CREATE TABLE test_table (data VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM configuration WHERE item_name = 'ServerPort') AND data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort') AS server_port, data FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY') ORDER BY server_port::INT ASC;
UPDATE configuration SET value = '200' WHERE item_name = 'MaxConnections' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM configuration WHERE section = 'Parameters');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM configuration WHERE item_name = 'ServerPort' AND value::INT < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table));
CREATE TABLE temp_test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, section VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, item_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO temp_test_table (section, item_name, value) SELECT 'Parameters', item_name, value FROM configuration WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM temp_test_table t WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM configuration c WHERE c.id = t.id) OR value IS NULL);
